title: TOCTOU race in lichen_l2_enable re-initialization
description: Location: lichen_l2.c:266-274. The check-then-init pattern for link_ctx is not atomic: if (atomic_get) then lichen_link_init + atomic_set. Two concurrent enable(true) calls could both pass the check and double-init link_ctx. This likely works today if lichen_link_init is idempotent, but violates the stated TOCTOU-prevention intent in lora_l2_init() comments. Should hold tx_mutex during the check-init-set sequence, or document that lichen_l2_enable is not thread-safe.
close_reason: Changed link_ctx_initialized from bool to atomic_t, using atomic_get/atomic_set throughout. RX path already holds rx_mutex, TX path holds tx_mutex.
